data.body: Done definition update: Update enrich-file-impact.sh idempotency check — the current code (lines 60-68) skips work when a ticket already has a ## File Impact section in its markdown. After the storage swap, this check MUST use get-file-impact: exit 0 when the returned array is non-empty; else run LLM enrichment + set-file-impact. Also update test-enrich-file-impact-v2-removal.sh if it asserts on the comment-path storage mechanism. Without this, re-invocations on post-refactor tickets call the LLM + set-file-impact repeatedly, doubling cost and producing duplicate FILE_IMPACT events (whose latest-wins semantics are defined in story 2985-f04d). [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
